title: Source Watcher Pipeline
description: A Source Watcher pipeline definition: an ordered list of extractor, transformer, and loader steps.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this file.

steps.description: Ordered list of pipeline steps. Must contain at least one extractor and one loader.

type.description: The role of this step in the pipeline.

name.description: The core step name (e.g. Csv, Json, ConvertCase, Database).

x.description: Canvas X position (used by the board UI, ignored by the API).

y.description: Canvas Y position (used by the board UI, ignored by the API).
